title: agalmyla inaequidentata
intro: Agalmyla inaequidentata, also known as the white or purple agalmyla, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat various health issues. Agalmyla inaequidentata is used to alleviate symptoms of respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties, and also helps to reduce fever and alleviate pain. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in traditional medicine practices in the Pacific Islands.
